content: maturin latest 1.14.1. Builds pyo3/cffi/uniffi bindings + Rust binaries as Python wheels. Supports Python 3.8+, Windows/Linux/macOS/FreeBSD. abi3 wheel support; abi3t for free-threaded. maturin-action for CI cross-compile. Does NOT itself handle CUDA toolkit; CUDA linking done in build.rs via cargo:rustc-link directives.
